prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
raw_response:
{
    "task_completion": false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true,
    "generalized_result_verification": false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": false,
    "clarity_and_justification": false,
    "hallucinations": true,
    "suggestions": "The agent should correctly identify the failure mode matching the symptom and provide relevant sensor data. It should not repeatedly call the same tool with the same arguments."
}

parsed_dims.suggestions: The agent should correctly identify the failure mode matching the symptom and provide relevant sensor data. It should not repeatedly call the same tool with the same arguments.
